rewrite_verification.notes: Link_nav_:hover sets color: var(--color_primary_default) only (IR is_hovered font_color); Link_nav_[aria-current="page"] sets color + font-weight with no background-color

criteria_audit.notes: Independent audit: 25 distinct var(--color_*) and var(--font_*) references in styles.json all resolve on :root; includes --color_primary_default_rgb for rgba() disabled states

71/71 base CSS classes present (IR keys match exactly, zero missing/extra); hover/disabled overrides faithful — Button_primary_.states.bTHKS → :disabled/[aria-disabled=true] with rgba(var(--color_primary_default_rgb), 0.5); Link_nav_:hover font_color only per IR is_hovered
Barrel imports tokens.css + bubble-styles.css; exports bubbleStyle(), styleRef, BUBBLE_STYLE_IDS (71 entries); main.tsx loads @/styles globally; legacy bubbleStyles.ts re-exports from @/styles

functional_audit.check: Design-system primitives load globally without runtime errors
bubbleStyle() resolves all 71 in-scope style_ref IDs

ui_evidence.notes: IR is_hovered: font_color var(--color_primary_default) only; no background-color
SPA active-route convention: primary color + font-weight; no background-color (B-1/B-2 fix confirmed)

critiques.finding: .Link_nav_[aria-current="page"] is an SPA routing convention (primary color for active nav) not defined in Bubble IR states; acceptable for downstream SHELL items but not IR-grounded
critiques.alternative: Document aria-current as an explicit SPA extension in index.ts or defer active-state styling to consuming NavLink components
